title: Department of Threat Assessment
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The New Republic's '''Department of Threat Assessment''' was created soon after the creation of the New Republic itself in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. It was a branch of the military forces which were originally formed from the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] which was phased out after the recapture of the galactic capital [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. One of its goals was helping the new government in its fight to eradicate [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] influence and the identification of any organizations that posed a threat to the security of the New Republic.

Its first head was [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] [[Zgorth'sth]], a veteran [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] member who was promoted to captain at the same time.
